programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: After Continental Airlines Flight 1404 careens off the runway and crashes in flames, investigators are left to determine what was to blame.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: While en route to Russia, Aeroflot Nord Flight 821 crashes onto the Trans-Siberian railway when on the final approach.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: LaMia Flight 2933 is on its final approach when the crew suddenly declares a fuel emergency.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: When United Express Flight 6291 crashes during its final approach only a mile from the runway, investigators must sift through the charred remains to find out what happened.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: Just a few minutes after taking off from Bucharest, Tarom's 371 flight plunges into a field and Romanian investigators call the FBI to determine whether it was an accident or an act of murder.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Megaworld

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The captains are feeling the pressure; even the smallest mistake can torpedo a captain's chance of taking the top spot; Capt. Reed Meredith becomes desperate when mechanical failures threaten to derail his season.

programme.title: If We Built It Today
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it; experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Megaworld
programme.desc: The latest information on Argentina's newest engineering and technological projects.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: A quota extension creates an all-out frenzy as the captains scramble to land a few more fish before the season ends; Capt. Reed Meredith knows he has what it takes to lead the fleet; northern boats try to keep pace with the southern fleet.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Insight into the production process that go into making everyday items such as conga drums, metal plating and buttons.

programme.title: Disasters at Sea
programme.desc: When a violent crack tears the MSC Napoli apart in January 2017, the crew is left stranded in the English Channel; rescuers must retrieve the crew and move the ship away from busy shipping lanes; investigators discover an alarming design flaw.
